sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59506" key="koufisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κουφ-ιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n59506.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ring-pad</tr_> round a trepan-opening, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl>(?)ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:19:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.19.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
